title: Part 8 – Passages multiples : annonce de poste et e-mail de suivi
instructions: Lisez les deux documents, puis répondez aux questions.

passages.label: Offre d'emploi
passages.text:
Job Posting: Customer Success Manager
Company: Brightwave Tech
Location: Remote (EU time zone preferred)
Salary: €55,000–€70,000 depending on experience

Brightwave Tech is looking for a Customer Success Manager to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will have a minimum of three years of experience in customer success or account management in a SaaS environment.

Key responsibilities:
— Manage a portfolio of 30–50 enterprise accounts
— Conduct quarterly business reviews with clients
— Work closely with the product team to relay customer feedback
— Achieve a customer retention rate of at least 90%

To apply: Send your CV and a short motivation letter to careers@brightwave.io by March 5th.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted within two weeks of the deadline.

passages.label: E-mail de suivi du candidat
passages.text:
From: Leila Mansour
To: careers@brightwave.io
Subject: Follow-up: Customer Success Manager Application

Dear Hiring Team,

I submitted my application for the Customer Success Manager role on February 28th and wanted to follow up to confirm it was received.

I have four years of experience in customer success at a B2B SaaS company, where I managed a portfolio of 40 enterprise accounts and maintained a retention rate of 94%.

I am available for an interview at any time and would be happy to provide references upon request.

Thank you for your time.
Leila Mansour

questions.prompt: What is the minimum experience required for this role?
questions.explanation: "a minimum of three years of experience in customer success or account management".
"Send your CV and a short motivation letter to careers@brightwave.io by March 5th".

questions.prompt: Did Leila submit her application before the deadline?
choices: No, she submitted it one day late
Yes, she submitted it several days before
No, she submitted it on the deadline day
questions.explanation: Leila a soumis le 28 février, soit plusieurs jours avant la date limite du 5 mars.

questions.prompt: How does Leila's experience compare to the job requirements?
choices: She meets the minimum but has no SaaS experience
She exceeds the minimum experience requirement
She does not meet the experience requirement
She only has experience in B2C companies
questions.explanation: Elle a 4 ans d'expérience, ce qui dépasse le minimum de 3 ans requis, dans un contexte SaaS B2B.

questions.prompt: What retention rate did Leila achieve in her previous role?
questions.explanation: "maintained a retention rate of 94%" — au-dessus des 90% exigés dans l'offre.
